seoTitle: How to Connect Outlook to Slack and Sync Your Calendar
metaDescription: Step-by-step guide to linking Microsoft Outlook with Slack, syncing meeting status, and installing the Outlook add-in to forward emails into channels.
intro: Switching between your inbox, calendar, and chat app all day adds up to a lot of wasted context switching. This guide shows how to connect Microsoft Outlook to Slack so your meetings automatically update your Slack status, and how to install the companion Outlook add-in so you can forward emails straight into a channel. It's aimed at anyone tired of manually updating their status every time they join a call.

steps.heading: Open the Slack App Directory
steps.body: From your workspace, go to the tools panel and open the App section to search Slack's directory of official integrations.

steps.heading: Add the Outlook Calendar app
steps.body: Search for Outlook Calendar, click Add to Slack, and follow the prompt to begin connecting your account.

steps.heading: Authenticate with your Microsoft 365 account
steps.body: You'll be redirected to a Microsoft login screen where you sign in and approve the requested permissions to link your corporate email and calendar.

steps.heading: Turn on automatic status syncing
steps.body: Inside the app's home tab in Slack, turn on status syncing so your presence automatically switches to 'In a meeting' whenever your Outlook calendar shows you're busy.

steps.heading: Install the Slack add-in for Outlook
steps.body: Head to Microsoft AppSource to grab the separate Slack for Outlook add-in, which lets you forward email threads directly into a Slack channel.

faq.question: Will my Slack status change automatically during meetings?
faq.answer: Yes, once you turn on status syncing in the Outlook Calendar app's settings, Slack will switch your status to 'In a meeting' whenever your Outlook calendar shows a scheduled event.

faq.question: Do I need admin approval to connect Outlook to Slack?
faq.answer: It depends on your workspace's app permission settings; some workspaces require an admin to approve new integrations before members can install them.

faq.question: Can I forward an entire email thread into Slack?
faq.answer: Yes, once the Slack for Outlook add-in is installed, you can push a message thread from your inbox directly into a chosen Slack channel.

faq.question: Is this integration free to use?
faq.answer: The Outlook Calendar and Slack for Outlook apps are free to install, though your access may depend on your existing Slack and Microsoft 365 plans.
